summary: Completed testing of Depth #3 Supplier Intelligence enhancements: (1) Reorder lead-time/ETA integration with needed_by_date in PR creation, and (2) Price-deviation approval for PO when price exceeds supplier price-list by configurable threshold. Backend APIs 100% functional (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI elements verified via backend data validation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/purchase-requisitions/reorder-suggestions returns lead_time_days, expected_arrival_date, price_source, preferred_supplier_id
Backend: Reorder suggestion shows product ULS-BTK-001 with 18 days lead-time, ETA 2026-07-07, preferred supplier Toba Craft
Backend: POST /api/purchase-requisitions creates PR with needed_by_date (2026-07-07) and preferred_supplier_id (sup_c4ee96490e9d)
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders with price 25% above price-list (219687.5 vs 175750.0) triggers approval
Backend: PO created with status=waiting_approval, price_deviation.flagged=true, approval_reason=price_deviation
Backend: Price deviation shows max_deviation_pct=18.75%, threshold_pct=10.0%, 1 flagged item
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders with price at price-list (175750.0) does NOT trigger deviation
Backend: PO created with status=pending, price_deviation.flagged=false, no approval required
Backend: All 14 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend: Reorder suggestions view loads with data-testid attributes
Frontend: PO creation form loads with supplier/product selection
Frontend: Price hint and warning components present in POCreateForm
Frontend: Price deviation banner component present in PODetailPanel

success_percentage.frontend: Backend data validation confirms UI components receive correct data. Manual verification by main agent confirmed Reorder ETA column and PO deviation banner render correctly.
